empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please provide me with more details so we can assist you better? When did these double charges occur? And have you checked your bank statements recently to see if there were any other suspicious transactions?
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out for the second time regarding my <PRODUCT>, order number <ORDER_ID>, and I'm getting a bit <SENTIMENT> with the situation. I've been a loyal customer for 2 years, but this month I was charged twice for the same subscription, with two identical charges of $49.99 showing up on my credit card statement. I've already tried contacting support once and was advised to check my account settings, but that didn't resolve the issue. I'd appreciate it if you could look into this and process a refund for the duplicate charge as soon as possible today.
empathetic_output.raw_steered_output: Can you please provide me with more details so we can assist you better? When did these double charges occur? And have you checked your bank statements recently to see if there were any other suspicious transactions?

formal_output.support_response: Our team will investigate the matter further and provide an update within one business day. In the meantime, please find our reference number below so we can expedite resolution of the double charging issue affecting your subscription. Thank you for choosing us!
